title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow routing planning and reasoning tasks to Claude Opus and UI/design tasks to Gemini 3.5 Flash. He argues this composition yields beautiful frontends more cost-effectively than using a single model for all phases.
